**Looking for help?**

This repository contains a sample application for learning purposes. It is **not a supported product** and is not intended for production use.

For questions about Salesforce Multi-Framework, check out the [developer documentation](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/platform/einstein-for-devs/guide/reactdev-overview.html).

For questions about Salesforce development in general, visit the [Trailblazer Community](https://trailhead.salesforce.com/trailblazer-community).

If you find a bug specific to this sample app, please [open an issue](../../issues/new) in this repository.
